name: datafast
title: Datafast
description: View your Datafast web analytics — visitors, revenue, pages, referrers, campaigns, and real-time data
author: joshmillgate

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Datafast API key (Dashboard > Website Settings > API)

preferences.name: timezone
preferences.title: Timezone
preferences.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to system timezone.

commands.name: dashboard-overview
commands.title: Dashboard Overview
commands.subtitle: View dashboard data and choose timeframes
commands.description: View key metrics: visitors, sessions, bounce rate, revenue, conversion rate

commands.name: realtime-visitors
commands.title: Realtime Visitors
commands.subtitle: View active visitors data
commands.description: View active visitors on your site right now

commands.name: top-pages
commands.title: Top Pages
commands.subtitle: Show top pages data
commands.description: View pages ranked by visitors or revenue

commands.name: top-referrers
commands.title: Top Referrers
commands.subtitle: Show your top referrers data
commands.description: View traffic sources ranked by visitors or revenue

commands.name: campaigns
commands.title: Campaigns
commands.subtitle: Show your campaigns data
commands.description: View campaign performance with UTM breakdowns

commands.name: countries
commands.title: Countries
commands.subtitle: Show countries data
commands.description: View traffic and revenue by country

commands.name: menu-bar-realtime
commands.title: Enable Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Show number of active visitors in the Mac menu bar
commands.description: Show live visitor count in your menu bar

preferences.name: saleNotifications
preferences.title: Sale Notifications
preferences.description: Show confetti and a notification when a new sale comes through
preferences.label: Enable sale notifications
